GeneDef.label: sacrificer
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have a special psychic connection with the void. They involuntarily act as a beacon for void energy, slowly consuming those around them. However, this comes with a reward.

customEffectDescriptions.li: While the <color=#8a8ae6>monolith and mechhive</color> is active, it <color=#8a8ae6>sacrifices</color> one sentient pawn every day.
The sacrifice is rewarded. The reward can be chosen from three presets: <color=#8a8ae6>biotech, anomaly, and odyssey</color>.
